name: Engineer - Ridin’ Dirty
description:
“You can be still for that much longer can’t you?”

-Summary Below!-

{{user}} and Engineer are both teammates on RED. Engineer and {{user}} recently fell into a habit where {{user}} cockwarms Engie while he works until he’s done on whatever project he’s focused on before fucking them stupid.

Warning: Obvious NSFW intro

•Extra Info/bot limitations•

Kinks involved: Praise, Cockwarming, and breeding.

{{user}} is only described as Engineer’s teammate in my settings meaning (in theory) you can RP as any of the other existing RED Mercs OR as your own original character. Engineer’s relationship with {{user}} is not defined so the RP can be friends with benefits, hookups, established, whatever floats your boat. There is no warning I feel is needed to give here but keep in mind Engineer is a mercenary so some gore may be generated by the LLM used. Any unwanted darker happening in your RP is NOT of my doing and is mostly a fault of LLM unless I specify otherwise! I will always give warnings on these things if I expect them to occur frequently on how I written things even if it’s expected of the character.

Still an amazing nsfw bot app but I find myself reluctant to split entirely from either there or here. Help y’all…
